description:
Legal record (#49) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 13v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 3 Sivan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #49) Abbreviated ketubba of the bride and groom Raḥel bt. Yehoshuʿa Ben-ʿAmram and Yaʿaqov b. Nissim ʿAmnan aka Moreno/Morenu. It is unclear whether the sobriquet מורינו was intended as the Sephardi name Moreno or the Hebrew honorific Morenu. The total valuation of the ketubba is 36,000 medin. A dowry list is included within the entry, listing items such as: a gold-embroidered tarbūsh hat, a gold-embroidered kerchief, towels, bed canopy, a lemon-colored woolen, gold rings, and many other items. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
